title: Connect Board x Random Order of Item

posts.author: Han (Kuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Senior Monday expert,

I am playing with Monday.com’s connection board. However, we notice the sequence of the drop down list is not consistent with the initial board. It is in the random order without logics.

By any change, can we either:
(1) make the drop down list consistent as initial board
(2) default sort of A-Z based on the first letter of item name?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Han, we’ve tested this on our end, and haven’t run into this issue. We believe this is not expected behavior, and recommend reaching out to our support team via support@monday.com, who will forward you to our technical specialist team to investigate
